(714) 834-8218
WHO WE ARE
:
Nurse-Family Partnership
® is a national, evidence-based, nurse home-visiting program that improves the health, well-being, and self-sufficiency of low-income, first-time parents and their children.
The Nurse Home Visitors work with clients to:
Improve pregnancy outcomes
Improve child health and development
Improve the economic self-sufficiency of the family
Program Eligibility
First Pregnancy
Less than 28 weeks pregnant*
Low-income
Desire to be involved in this program
(*The nurse must be able to make a home visit before the 28th week of pregnancy. Please refer as early in the pregnancy as possible.
Reach Us At: (714) 834-8218
Home Visit Schedule: (Once the mother decides to enroll in the program)
Weekly for the first 4 weeks,
Every other week until the child is born,
Weekly, again for 6 weeks,
Every other week until the child is 21 months old,
Monthly until the child is 2 years old
